_note: Read-only mirror of _SPINE_v1.json templates[] (SSOT-locked). Loaded, never mutated. Drift guard: the 10 ids must match the spine exactly.

deterministic_checks.name: href_resolves
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: status in [200,301,302,308] AND href not in ['', '#', 'javascript:void(0)']

templates.pattern_expansion: Fans to ALL nav + footer + in-body links matching scope_selector; one check per unique href.
Fans to ALL CTAs (every [data-cta]/primary button) across the surface.

deterministic_checks.name: cookie_link_present_and_resolves
deterministic_checks.logic: footer selector match + HTTP GET target
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: link whose text/href matches 'cookie' exists AND status==200 AND href not in ['','#']

templates.pattern_expansion: Fans to ALL required legal links (privacy/terms/cookie/accessibility) in the footer.
Fans to ALL auth entrypoints (header sign-in, footer sign-in, in-body CTAs to login/signup).

deterministic_checks.name: offer_name_matches_canonical
deterministic_checks.logic: regex/string-equality of rendered offer name vs canonical

templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL commercial surfaces/pages that reference the offer.

deterministic_checks.name: price_matches_canonical
deterministic_checks.logic: regex extract price token, string-equality vs expected_price

deterministic_checks.name: duration_matches_canonical
deterministic_checks.logic: regex extract duration token, equality vs expected_duration

templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL commercial surfaces where the price/duration is claimed.

deterministic_checks.name: request_id_visible
deterministic_checks.logic: regex match against rendered text / attribute presence
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: id_regex matches rendered DOM text OR [data-request-id] attribute is non-empty

templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL views expected to show a request id.

deterministic_checks.name: chat_controls_present
deterministic_checks.logic: DOM presence of input + send control

deterministic_checks.name: chat_input_labeled
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: input has non-empty aria-label OR placeholder

templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL pages that mount the chat widget.

deterministic_checks.name: viewport_meta_present
deterministic_checks.logic: regex on HTML head for <meta name=viewport>

deterministic_checks.name: no_horizontal_overflow
deterministic_checks.logic: headless measure scrollWidth vs innerWidth at 375px

templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL key routes at the fixed mobile viewport.
Fans across ALL discovered/declared key routes.
